title: Failure Classification, Retry Budgets, Backoff, and Load Shedding · Independent Type Trial
summary: An independent integration team receives different traffic, tenant, topology, schema, and failure constraints and transfers failure classification, retry budgets, backoff, and load shedding into a new failure taxonomy and bounded retry policy. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of failure taxonomy and bounded retry policy with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Classify malformed, unauthorized, missing dependency, rate limit, timeout, conflict, transient, permanent, and ambiguous effect failures by evidence.
Bound attempts, total age, delay, processing deadline, queue residence, and operator escalation as one retry budget.
Apply exponential backoff and jitter without blocking consumer slots or requeueing hot loops and preserve intended availability time.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Transient Permanent Ambiguous
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab messaging team handles case 8600 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to classify permanent and ambiguous outcomes before applying both attempt and age budgets; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement decision owner; then add one subscriber responsibility without changing publisher intent. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Transient Permanent Ambiguous.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for classify malformed, unauthorized, missing dependency, rate limit, timeout, conflict, transient, permanent, and ambiguous effect failures by evidence. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Transient Permanent Ambiguous, keep Transient Permanent Ambiguous connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
